communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I respectfully request access to and copies of  Verra Mobility's RFP records related to the procurement of a school bus stop-arm camera associated with Austin ISD RFP submitted on November 15, 2024 .  

Solicitation/Bid: RFP# 25RFP029

Title/Description: School Bus Safety Stop-Arm Camera

Issuing Entity: Austin Independent School District 

Specifically, I am requesting: 

Copy of Verra Mobility's proposal and responses submitted for Austin ISD RFP# 25RFP029 submitted on November 15, 2024.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jon Smith

title: BWC & Incident Records: Whitney Beall "Periscope" DUI Investigation (October 10, 2015)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am submitting this request on behalf of my professional YouTube news and educational channel that reports on police interactions, body camera footage, public safety incidents, and transparency in law enforcement. Our content is journalistic in nature, aimed at informing the public about police procedures and accountability through factual, narrated analysis of public records.

I am requesting all available body-worn camera (BWC) and dashcam footage, as well as the incident report, regarding the DUI arrest of Whitney Beall.

Specific details to assist your search:

Incident Date: October 10, 2015

Location: Lakeland, FL

Suspect Name: Whitney Beall (23 at the time)

Incident Summary: The suspect live-streamed herself on the app "Periscope" while driving intoxicated. Viewers called 911, and Lakeland PD used the live-stream to track and arrest her. This case is a unique look at digital-age law enforcement work.

Records requested:

All BWC and Dashcam footage capturing the traffic stop, field sobriety tests, and arrest.

The full Narrative/Incident Report.

Any 911 calls received from viewers of the live-stream and the corresponding dispatch logs.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Andrej Ilic

title: Reports about Gene Wu's son as cited in Dallas Express

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am seeking any and all emails or communications between employees of the Houston Regional Intelligence Service Center and the Dallas Express, a news outlet in Dallas. I am also seeking any and all reports that are referenced in this Dallas Express article: https://dallasexpress.com/breaking/controversial-texas-rep-gene-wus-sons-concerning-behavior-at-prominent-private-school-reported-to-dps-after-knife-incident/

Specifically,  the article cited "information about the incidents involving Wu’s son was reported by the Houston Regional Intelligence Service Center (HRISC) to the state’s law enforcement intelligence network and categorized as “school safety related.”"

The Dallas Express article cited "information provided to the Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS)" via the HRISC that alleges "Wu’s son was described as displaying “oppositional” and “deviant” behaviors at school, particularly toward females, and as someone who “often incites incidents by irritating and intentionally upsetting other students.” The reports also describe incidents in which the student allegedly argued with teachers and lost his temper. Community submissions to school administrators cited “anger issues” and alleged “assault offenses.”"

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Steven Monacelli

Andrej Ilic

title: BWC & Incident Records: Marshawn Lynch DUI Investigation (August 9, 2022)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am submitting this request on behalf of my professional YouTube news and educational channel that reports on police interactions, body camera footage, public safety incidents, and transparency in law enforcement. Our content is journalistic in nature, aimed at informing the public about police procedures and accountability through factual, narrated analysis of public records.

I am requesting all available body-worn camera (BWC) and dashcam footage, as well as the initial incident report, regarding the DUI investigation involving suspect Marshawn Lynch.

Specific details to assist your search:

Incident Date: August 9, 2022 (Early morning)

Location: Near Fairfield Avenue and West Utah Avenue, Las Vegas, NV

Suspect Name: Marshawn Lynch (former NFL player)

Incident Summary: Officers found a sports car in an undrivable condition (missing a rim/tire) with the suspect inside. The suspect was non-compliant during the investigation, leading to a professional but firm custodial arrest for suspected DUI.

Records requested:

All BWC footage capturing the initial contact, the refusal to exit the vehicle, and the eventual custodial arrest.

The full Narrative/Arrest Report and Charging Affidavit.

All 911 emergency call recordings and dispatch/CAD logs related to the "check welfare" or "disabled vehicle" call.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Andrej Ilic

title: BWC & Incident Records: Patricia Cornwall In-Flight Assault & Arrest (December 23, 2021)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am submitting this request on behalf of my professional YouTube news and educational channel that reports on police interactions, body camera footage, public safety incidents, and transparency in law enforcement. Our content is journalistic in nature, aimed at informing the public about police procedures and accountability through factual, narrated analysis of public records.

I am requesting all available body-worn camera (BWC) footage and incident records regarding the arrest of Patricia Cornwall upon the landing of Delta Flight 2790.

Specific details to assist your search:

Incident Date: December 23, 2021

Location: Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport (Gate area)

Suspect Name: Patricia Cornwall

Incident Summary: A former actress/cheerleader engaged in a physical altercation with a fellow passenger on a flight from Tampa to Atlanta. She was met by Atlanta PD and FBI agents at the gate. The footage captures the behavior of the suspect during her detention.

Records requested:

All BWC footage from the Atlanta Police Department officers who met the aircraft and detained the suspect.

The initial Incident Report and any documentation of the transfer to federal custody.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Andrej Ilic

communications.subject: Nevada Public Records Act Request: AER - NV State Health Division
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All adverse medical event and sentinel event records filed with the Nevada Department of Health and Human Services between Jan. 1, 2023 and Jan. 1, 2025.

I request these records in their native digital formats and not in formats that degrade the accessibility of the records, such as tabular data converted to PDF or Word files. If converting the native digital format to another high-fidelity format, such as CSV or Excel, please take care not to introduce formatting inconsistencies or errors, which can occur in the conversion process (for example, encoding errors or the inclusion of internal unescaped quotation marks in CSV files). Should the records above represent certain values as numeric codes or abbreviations that are not self-explanatory, we additionally request all records necessary to interpret those codes and abbreviations.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Michael Nolan

title: BWC & Incident Records: Officer Steven Casarez Shooting Incident (October 20, 2021)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am submitting this request on behalf of my professional YouTube news and educational channel that reports on police interactions, body camera footage, public safety incidents, and transparency in law enforcement. Our content is journalistic in nature, aimed at informing the public about police procedures and accountability through factual, narrated analysis of public records.

I am requesting all available body-worn camera (BWC) and dashcam footage, as well as the incident report, regarding the officer-involved shooting involving suspect Jesse Mejia.

Specific details to assist your search:

Incident Date: October 20, 2021

Location: 400 block of East Pioneer Parkway, Arlington, TX

Suspect Name: Jesse Mejia

Involved Officer: Officer Steven Casarez

Incident Summary: During a foot pursuit, the suspect opened fire, striking Officer Casarez in the foot. Despite the injury, the officer returned fire and neutralized the threat. 

Records requested:

All BWC footage from Officer Steven Casarez and arriving backup officers.

All Dashcam footage from patrol units on the scene.

The complete Incident and Arrest Reports, including the internal use-of-force review.

911 audio and radio traffic from the "officer down/shots fired" calls.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Andrej Ilic

title: BWC & Incident Records: Courtney Kiser Fatal DUI Investigation (March 15, 2019)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Arizona Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am submitting this request on behalf of my professional YouTube news and educational channel that reports on police interactions, body camera footage, public safety incidents, and transparency in law enforcement. Our content is journalistic in nature, aimed at informing the public about police procedures and accountability through factual, narrated analysis of public records.

I am requesting all available body-worn camera (BWC) and dashcam footage, as well as the initial incident report, regarding the DUI investigation and arrest of Courtney Kiser.

Specific details to assist your search:

Incident Date: March 15, 2019

Location: Indian School Road and 64th Street, Scottsdale, AZ

Suspect Name: Courtney Kiser

Incident Summary: Following a verbal argument in a moving vehicle, a passenger (Summer Crosswhite) jumped from the car and later died from her injuries. The driver, Courtney Kiser, was investigated for DUI at the scene. The footage captures the field sobriety tests and the subsequent arrest.

Records requested:

All BWC and Dashcam footage from the initial responding officers and those performing the DUI investigation.

The full Narrative/Arrest Report and Charging Affidavit.

All 911 emergency call recordings and dispatch/CAD logs related to the "person down" and DUI report.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Andrej Ilic
